Discover our exquisite collection of handcrafted gold, silver and diamond jewellery — each piece a celebration of artistry and elegance.

Explore on Instagram WhatsApp Us

Our Story

Nestled in the heart of Bangemudha — Kathmandu's historic jewellery district — Elara Jewellers crafts fine jewellery that tells your story.

Every piece is a labour of love, blending traditional Nepali craftsmanship with contemporary design. Whether you seek a classic gold set, an elegant silver piece, or a bespoke creation made just for you, our artisans bring your vision to life with meticulous care.

See Our Work

Hallmarked Gold
BIS

Orders Welcome

Our Collections

From bridal sets to everyday elegance — find pieces that speak to your soul.

Gold Jewellery

Timeless gold necklaces, bangles, rings and earrings crafted in 18K, 22K and 24K purity.

Silver Jewellery

Sterling silver with intricate detailing — from contemporary minimalist to traditional Nepali patterns.

Diamond & Gemstone

Certified diamonds and precious gemstones — perfect for engagements, anniversaries and gifting.

Bridal Sets

Complete bridal jewellery from Naugedi to Tilhari — designed for your special day.

Bespoke & Custom

Have a design in mind? Our artisans craft your dream piece from scratch — uniquely yours.
